$schema_note: Phase 1 — Authentication, Authorization, and OSAS Identity Integration. These two work packages block nearly everything else in Phase 1: every protected route, every role guard, and the student/faculty records themselves depend on P1.AUTH + P1.OSAS existing first.

work_packages.name: Authentication & Authorization
work_packages.goal: Students sign in via OSAS SSO (active status only); staff sign in locally with argon2id + lockout; JWT access + rotating refresh tokens; RBAC middleware enforced on every protected route.

tasks.title: users + refresh_tokens Prisma models
tasks.description: users (role enum, auth_provider enum, lockout fields) and refresh_tokens (token_hash, family_id, device_info, ip_address) tables + indexes.
acceptance_criteria: users(email) and users(role) indexed
refresh_tokens(token_hash) unique/indexed

tasks.title: Config & crypto infra (env parsing, argon2id, JWT)
tasks.description: config/ zod env parser; argon2id password hashing (64MB/3/4); jsonwebtoken access token issuance (HS256, 15min); crypto-random refresh token generation + SHA-256 hash-at-rest.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover hash/verify round-trip and token generation

tasks.title: POST /auth/login (student via OSAS + staff local)
tasks.description: Role-hinted login: students verified via OSAS server-to-server (eligibility gate, profile upsert); staff verified locally (lockout counter: 5/15min, persisted).
acceptance_criteria: Active OSAS student logs in → profile upserted, tokens issued (testing-definition.json critical scenario)
Alumni/inactive OSAS status → 403 STUDENT_INACTIVE, no session created
5 failed staff attempts → 15 min lock, persisted not in-memory

tasks.title: POST /auth/refresh with rotation + reuse detection
tasks.description: Rotate on every refresh (old revoked); reuse of a revoked token revokes the entire token family (theft detection).
acceptance_criteria: testing-definition.json: 'Refresh rotation works; refresh token reuse revokes the whole family'

tasks.title: Logout, /auth/me, device sessions list/revoke
tasks.description: POST /auth/logout (revoke current refresh token), GET /auth/me, GET/DELETE /auth/sessions/:id.
acceptance_criteria: Revoking a device session immediately invalidates that refresh token

tasks.title: Staff forgot/reset password + optional admin OTP
tasks.description: Single-use emailed token (30min expiry, invalidated on use/new request); optional email OTP step for SUPER_ADMIN/DEPT_ADMIN gated by settings.
acceptance_criteria: Reused/expired reset token is rejected
tasks.notes: Depends on mailer infra — see 06-phase1-notifications-settings-audit.json P1.NOTIF.BE02.

tasks.title: authenticate / authorize(roles) / rate-limit middleware
tasks.description: authenticate → authorize(roles) → ownership guard chain per every protected route; express-rate-limit tuned per api-specification.json#global.rate_limits.
acceptance_criteria: Role escalation attempts (student calling admin endpoints) → 403 for every admin route (matrix sweep test)

tasks.title: Login page + role auto-detect
tasks.description: Single form: students use OSAS credentials, staff use portal accounts; friendly inactive/alumni/lockout errors.
acceptance_criteria: Every documented error state (STUDENT_INACTIVE, lockout, invalid credentials) has a distinct friendly message

tasks.title: Forgot/Reset password pages
tasks.description: Staff-only flow; students directed to OSAS for credential issues.
acceptance_criteria: Token-invalid state clearly explained

tasks.title: authStore (Zustand) + axios interceptor + silent refresh
tasks.description: Access token kept in memory only; axios interceptor calls /auth/refresh once on 401 then retries queued requests; hard logout on refresh failure; session restore on app boot; 30min idle logout with warning dialog.
acceptance_criteria: Access token never touches localStorage (verified by test)
Concurrent 401s trigger exactly one refresh call

tasks.title: RequireAuth / RequireRole route guards + feature-flag hiding
tasks.description: Redirect unauthenticated to /login; RequireRole(roles) per route group; disabled modules hide routes (404) mirroring settings feature flags — UX-only, backend remains sole authority.
acceptance_criteria: Every role's landing route matches roles-and-permissions.json

tasks.title: Device sessions UI (Profile page)
tasks.description: List active device sessions with revoke action, embedded in the Profile page.
acceptance_criteria: Revoke immediately reflects (session disappears, that device is logged out)

tasks.title: Auth/OSAS integration + E2E test suite
tasks.description: Covers all critical_test_scenarios.auth_osas entries plus the student login E2E journey.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 listed auth_osas scenarios pass in CI

work_packages.name: OSAS Integration
work_packages.goal: Server-to-server client for the university OSAS API: SSO verification, profile/schedule/calendar sync, nightly jobs, health/status endpoint, sync logs, admin alerting on failure.

tasks.title: osas_sync_logs Prisma model
tasks.description: sync_type/trigger/status/records_processed/error_details.
acceptance_criteria: Append-only: no UPDATE/DELETE grants, per integrity_rules

tasks.title: osasClient infra module
tasks.description: Server-to-server HTTP client (TLS, API credentials from env, zod-validated responses, timeouts + circuit breaker).
acceptance_criteria: OSAS timeout → OSAS_UNAVAILABLE, no partial account state (critical scenario)
tasks.risk: Real OSAS API contract/credentials not yet confirmed — see SystemDefinition5.txt §9.

tasks.title: Nightly sync jobs (students, schedules, calendar)
tasks.description: node-cron jobs: osas-nightly-sync (02:00) upserts students/schedules/calendar exceptions preserving local-only fields; writes osas_sync_logs; alerts admins on failure.
acceptance_criteria: OSAS sync upsert preserves local-only fields (adviser) and logs results (critical scenario)

tasks.title: Manual sync trigger + status endpoints
tasks.description: GET /integrations/osas/status, POST .../sync/students|schedules|calendar.
acceptance_criteria: DA/SA can trigger + observe a sync from the admin UI

tasks.title: /healthz liveness endpoint (db + osas reachability)
tasks.description: GET /healthz → { status, db, osas, uptime }.
acceptance_criteria: Uptime monitor can poll this every 60s per deployment-definition.json

tasks.title: OSAS status card + sync trigger + sync logs table (admin)
tasks.description: Admin Dashboard OSAS sync status card; Settings/OSAS panel with manual triggers and sync log history.
deliverables: OSAS status widget + sync log table components
acceptance_criteria: PARTIAL/FAILED sync statuses are visually distinct (badge)

tasks.title: OSAS outage runbook drill
tasks.description: Simulate OSAS outage; verify existing sessions keep working (cached profiles), new logins blocked with clear message, admin alerted, manual re-sync recovers.
acceptance_criteria: Matches the documented runbook exactly
